description_long: This is a round, vintage-style lantern with a heavily rusted and weathered metal exterior, giving it an aged, industrial appearance. The body is predominantly spherical, with a wide circular glass window on the front and back, allowing visibility into the interior chamber. At the top, there is a conical vented cap with a prominent metal ring, likely for hanging or carrying the lantern. The base is a flat, circular metal plate, providing stability when placed on a surface. The surface is mottled with reddish-brown rust and greenish patina, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, focusing on function and durability.
description: A round, rusted metal lantern with a glass window, vented top, and hanging ring, showing heavy weathering and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular glass window, vented top, and hanging ring clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lantern's thick, cylindrical body and the flat base, with the ring and top cap visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite glass window and the same vented top and ring.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the cylindrical body and flat base, with the ring and top cap in profile.
